chapter_title.en: Forbearance and endurance as virtues of courage

text: ٤٦٠. وَقَالَ (عليه ‏السلام): الْحِلْمُ وَالْأَنَاةُ تَوْأَمَانِ يُنْتِجُهُمَا عُلُوُّ الْهِمَّةِ.

en.sayed-ali-raza: 460. Amīr al-mu’minīn, peace be upon him, said: Forbearance and endurance are twins and they are the product of high courage.
